steps.title: Find the subject head
steps.content: The subject is her book's musings on tenth-century Japanese courtly life. The head noun musings is plural, so the verb must use a plural form.

steps.title: Reject singular verbs
steps.content: B, C, and D all use singular verb forms that do not agree with musings. The plural present-tense form agrees with the subject. The answer is A.
